title: Hemionitis perrieri
taxonomy: Hemionitis perrieri is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the kingdom Plantae. The classification of Hemionitis perrieri is further divided into the phylum Pteridophyta and the class Polypodiopsida. Within the class Polypodiopsida, it is part of the subclass Polypodiidae and the order Polypodiales. Hemionitis perrieri is also known to be a part of the family Dryopteridaceae under its subfamily Dryopteridoideae.
